nasb.text: “Behold, then, I smite My hand at your dishonest gain which you have acquired and at the bloodshed which is among you.

esv.text: “Behold, I strike my hand at the dishonest gain that you have made, and at the blood that has been in your midst.

cnv.text: “‘看哪！因你所得的不義之財，又因在你中間所流的血，我就拍掌。

ccb.text: “‘我见你谋财害命，就击掌叹息。
